KHAS Team at CFA Turkey Research Challenge 2019

A team of three students (Rahman Barış Başaran, Gizem Sevimli, Şule Bostancıoğlu) from the Department of International Trade and Finance representing Kadir Has University will participate in this year’s “CFA Turkey, Research Challenge-2019” competition. The team is led by Assoc. Prof. Dr. Belma Öztürkkal and the faculty members of the department are providing all necessary support.
